violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. After leaving the kitchen to get a new glass of water, food employee did not wash his hands upon returning to the kitchen and beginning food preparation.. Hands should be washed when entering the kitchen, before preparing foods.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving units in the reach-in cooler in the server area were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
